name: contextdx
description: ContextDX plugins for codebase and knowledge architecture analysis, visualization, and sync to ContextDX Portal.

metadata.description: ContextDX plugins for codebase and knowledge architecture analysis, visualization, and sync to ContextDX Portal.

plugins.name: cdx-code
plugins.description: Real-time codebase architecture analysis and visualization for ContextDX Portal. Analyzes codebases across multiple languages, detects tech stacks, identifies component relationships, and syncs to ContextDX for collaborative architecture boards. Supports server-defined insight analysis skills.

plugins.name: cdx-work
plugins.description: Knowledge and document architecture analysis for ContextDX Portal. Analyzes a document/knowledge set — specs, RFCs, policies, design docs, wikis — into a graph of concepts, documents, decisions, and their relationships, and syncs to ContextDX for collaborative knowledge boards. Tuned for Claude Cowork. Supports server-defined insight analysis skills.
